heading: Authorization of appropriations; required funding
label: 3809 Authorization of appropriations; required funding
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary for purposes of carrying out this chapter, not to exceed $3,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , not less than one-half of which shall be for the purpose of making loans under ; not to exceed $5,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , not less than one-half of which shall be for the purpose of making loans under ; not to exceed $5,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , not less than one-half of which shall be for the purpose of making loans under ; and such sums as may be necessary for the fiscal years ending , and . Any amount appropriated pursuant to this section shall remain available until expended.September 30, 1982September 30, 1983September 30, 1984September 30, 1985September 30, 1986section 3806(b) of this titlesection 3806(b) of this titlesection 3806(b) of this title
